pandoc 
  to: html
  output-file: index.html
  standalone: true
  title-prefix: Sedimentology Lab
  section-divs: true
  html-math-method: mathjax
  wrap: none
  default-image-extension: png
  css:
    - styles.css
  toc: true
  
metadata
  document-css: false
  link-citations: true
  date-format: long
  lang: en
  navbar:
    left:
      - href: index.qmd
        text: Home
      - href: pi.qmd
        text: Principal Investigator
      - href: members.qmd
        text: Members
      - href: research.qmd
        text: Research
      - href: contact.qmd
        text: Contact
      - about.qmd
  editor: visual
  theme:
    - cosmo
    - brand
  title: Sed-Lab-Website
